w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: <h:title>LbCSI - with Washington Group Short Set Questions on disability</h:title>

<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/77254806-00B0-4FD8-8263-2D2602515978" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="LbCSI - with Washington Group Short Set Questions on disability">

or #form/Disability/WSS2 = 'cannot' or #form/Disability/WSS3 = 'lot_of_difficulty' or #form/Disability/WSS3 = 'cannot' or #form/Disability/WSS4 = 'lot_of_difficulty' or #form/Disability/WSS4 = 'cannot' or #form/Disability/WSS5 = 'lot_of_difficulty' or #form/Disability/WSS5 = 'cannot' or #form/Disability/WSS6 = 'lot_of_difficulty' or #form/Disability/WSS6 = 'cannot', "yes", "no")" calculate="if(/data/Disability/WSS1 = 'lot_of_difficulty' or /data/Disability/WSS1 = 'cannot' or /data/Disability/WSS2 = 'lot_of_difficulty' or /data/Disability/WSS2 = 'cannot' or /data/Disability/WSS3 = 'lot_of_difficulty' or /data/Disability/WSS3 = 'cannot' or /data/Disability/WSS4 = 'lot_of_difficulty' or /data/Disability/WSS4 = 'cannot' or /data/Disability/WSS5 = 'lot_of_difficulty' or /data/Disability/WSS5 = 'cannot' or /data/Disability/WSS6 = 'lot_of_difficulty' or /data/Disability/WSS6 = 'cannot', "yes", "no")" />

<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/stress_indicator_" nodeset="/data/stress_indicator_" vellum:calculate="if(#form/sold_assets = "a" or #form/sold_assets = "b" or #form/reduced_nonfood_expenses = "a" or #form/reduced_nonfood_expenses = "b" or #form/sold_productive_assests = "a" or #form/sold_productive_assests = "b" or #form/spent_savings = "a" or #form/spent_savings = "b", "yes", "no")" calculate="if(/data/sold_assets = "a" or /data/sold_assets = "b" or /data/reduced_nonfood_expenses = "a" or /data/reduced_nonfood_expenses = "b" or /data/sold_productive_assests = "a" or /data/sold_productive_assests = "b" or /data/spent_savings = "a" or /data/spent_savings = "b", "yes", "no")" />

<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/crisis_indicator_" nodeset="/data/crisis_indicator_" vellum:calculate="if(#form/borrowed_money_food = "a" or #form/borrowed_money_food = "b" or #form/sold_house_land = "a" or #form/sold_house_land = "b" or #form/withdrew_children = "a" or #form/withdrew_children = "b", "yes", "no")" calculate="if(/data/borrowed_money_food = "a" or /data/borrowed_money_food = "b" or /data/sold_house_land = "a" or /data/sold_house_land = "b" or /data/withdrew_children = "a" or /data/withdrew_children = "b", "yes", "no")" />

<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/emergency_indicator_" nodeset="/data/emergency_indicator_" vellum:calculate="if(#form/sold_female_animals = "a" or #form/sold_female_animals = "b" or #form/begging = "a" or #form/begging = "b" or #form/sold_more_animals = "a" or #form/sold_more_animals = "b", "yes", "no")" calculate="if(/data/sold_female_animals = "a" or /data/sold_female_animals = "b" or /data/begging = "a" or /data/begging = "b" or /data/sold_more_animals = "a" or /data/sold_more_animals = "b", "yes", "no")" />

<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/household_category_" nodeset="/data/household_category_" vellum:calculate="if(#form/emergency_indicator_ = "yes", "emergency", if(#form/crisis_indicator_ = "yes" and #form/emergency_indicator_ = "no", "crisis", if(#form/stress_indicator_ = "yes" and #form/crisis_indicator_ = "no" and #form/emergency_indicator_ = "no", "stress", "food secure")))" calculate="if(/data/emergency_indicator_ = "yes", "emergency", if(/data/crisis_indicator_ = "yes" and /data/emergency_indicator_ = "no", "crisis", if(/data/stress_indicator_ = "yes" and /data/crisis_indicator_ = "no" and /data/emergency_indicator_ = "no", "stress", "food secure")))" />
<value>The Washington Group Short Set of Questions of Disability</value>

-Don't use the word disability. Ensure that the word disability is never mentioned especially to introduce the questions. Research has shown that this may bias the response and thus affect the quality of the data collection.
-Read the questions exactly. Read the responses aloud
-Do allow participants to skip questions if they don't want to or refuse to answer a question, move to the next one</value>

-Don't use the word disability. Ensure that the word disability is never mentioned especially to introduce the questions. Research has shown that this may bias the response and thus affect the quality of the data collection.
-Read the questions exactly. Read the responses aloud
-Do allow participants to skip questions if they don't want to or refuse to answer a question, move to the next one</value>
<value>**Interviewer to read aloud** : The next questions ask about difficulties you may have doing certain activities because of a health problem.</value>
<value form="markdown">**Interviewer to read aloud** : The next questions ask about difficulties you may have doing certain activities because of a health problem.</value>
<value>Do you have difficulty seeing, even if wearing glasses?</value>
<value form="markdown">Do you have difficulty seeing, even if wearing glasses?</value>
<value>Do you have difficulty hearing, even if using a hearing aid?</value>
<value form="markdown">Do you have difficulty hearing, even if using a hearing aid?</value>
<value>Do you have difficulty walking or climbing steps?</value>
<value form="markdown">Do you have difficulty walking or climbing steps?</value>
<value> Do you have difficulty remembering or concentrating?</value>
<value form="markdown"> Do you have difficulty remembering or concentrating?</value>
<value>Do you have difficulty (with self-care such as) washing all over or dressing?</value>
<value form="markdown">Do you have difficulty (with self-care such as) washing all over or dressing?</value>
<value>Using your usual (customary) language, do you or any member of your household have difficulty communicating, for example understanding or being understood?</value>
<value form="markdown">Using your usual (customary) language, do you or any member of your household have difficulty communicating, for example understanding or being understood?</value>

<value>Next set of questions are about coping strategies used by your household. During the past 30 days, did anyone in your household have to do any of the following due to a lack of food or a lack of money to buy food?</value>
<value>1.1 Sold household assets/goods (radio, furniture, refrigerator, television, jewellery etc.)</value>
<value>B= No, already sold assets or have engaged in this activity within the last 12 mo</value>
<value>C= No, because we did not face a shortage of food</value>
<value>1.2 Reduced non-food expenses on health (including drugs) and education</value>
<value>B= No, already sold assets or have engaged in this activity within the last 12 mo</value>
<value>C= No, because we did not face a shortage of food</value>
<value>1.3 Sold productive assets or means of transport (sewing machine, wheelbarrow, bicycle, car, etc.)</value>
<value>B= No, already sold assets or have engaged in this activity within the last 12 mo</value>
<value>C= No, because we did not face a shortage of food</value>
<value>B= No, already sold assets or have engaged in this activity within the last 12 mo</value>
<value>C= No, because we did not face a shortage of food</value>
<value>1.5 Borrowed money / food from a formal lender / bank</value>
<value>B= No, already sold assets or have engaged in this activity within the last 12 mo</value>
<value>C= No, because we did not face a shortage of food</value>
<value>B= No, already sold assets or have engaged in this activity within the last 12 mo</value>
<value>C= No, because we did not face a shortage of food</value>
<value>B= No, already sold assets or have engaged in this activity within the last 12 mo</value>
<value>C= No, because we did not face a shortage of food</value>
<value>B= No, already sold assets or have engaged in this activity within the last 12 mo</value>
<value>C= No, because we did not face a shortage of food</value>
<value>B= No, already sold assets or have engaged in this activity within the last 12 mo</value>
<value>C= No, because we did not face a shortage of food</value>
<value>B= No, already sold assets or have engaged in this activity within the last 12 mo</value>
<value>C= No, because we did not face a shortage of food</value>

w:settings.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du

w:styles.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du

w:webSettings.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du

w:fonts.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du
